name: Beef Burgundy Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole, cook bacon on high heat for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until done. Drain the bacon and set it aside, reserving the drippings in the casserole.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon into the casserole.
3. Stir flour, bouillon granules, and basil into the reserved drippings.
4. Add beef, undrained tomatoes, and wine; mix well.
5. Cook covered on high heat for 2 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to medium (50% power) and cook covered for 15 minutes, stirring twice.
7. Stir in onions and mushrooms.
8. Continue cooking covered at medium (50% power) for 12 to 18 minutes or until the meat and vegetables are tender, stirring twice.
9. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top and serve.
